comment: Structured metadata file for the dataset used in the Gurnani and Silver 2021 paper.
paper_title: Multidimensional population activity in an electrically coupled inhibitory circuit in the cerebellar cortex
experiment_description: This dataset was generated for the study 'Multidimensional population activity in an electrically coupled inhibitory circuit in the cerebellar cortex' by Gurnani and Silver in Neuron, 2021. It includes pre-processed two-photon imaging data and behavioural data from head-fixed awake mice exhibiting spontaneous whisking and locomotion on a cylindrical wheel.
